creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot reproduce the failure. I can successfully build ftp/curl with the same options and openssl setting (DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl111) on a new 12.0-RELEASE-p2 amd64 poudriere. My guess is the you might have a mixed openssl dependency.

Could you try it again on a new poudriere jail or on the same jail after removing all dependencies packages?
